message:
fix(io,ufunc): safe u64->usize cast in memmap, correct shift/reduction sidecar semantics

- fnp-io: replace `as usize` cast on file length with `try_from().unwrap_or(usize::MAX)` to avoid truncation on 32-bit targets
- fnp-ufunc: fix left/right shift to return 0 (or arithmetic fill) for out-of-range shift amounts instead of masking with & 63
- fnp-ufunc: route reduce_sum through synthesized_integer_sidecar so the sidecar is always present before axis reduction
- fnp-ufunc: apply initial value via integer sidecar wrapping arithmetic in reduce_sum_with_initial and reduce_prod_with_initial

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2788,10 +2788,12 @@ pub fn memmap(
                 .write(true)
                 .open(path)
                 .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to open file for rw"))?;
-            let file_len = file
-                .metadata()
-                .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to read file metadata"))?
-                .len() as usize;
+            let file_len = usize::try_from(
+                file.metadata()
+                    .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to read file metadata"))?
+                    .len(),
+            )
+            .unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
             let end = offset
                 .checked_add(expected_bytes)
                 .ok_or(IOError::MemmapContractViolation("mapping range overflowed"))?;
@@ -2818,10 +2820,12 @@ pub fn memmap(
         MemmapMode::ReadOnly | MemmapMode::CopyOnWrite => {
             let mut file = std::fs::File::open(path)
                 .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to open file"))?;
-            let file_len = file
-                .metadata()
-                .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to read file metadata"))?
-                .len() as usize;
+            let file_len = usize::try_from(
+                file.metadata()
+                    .map_err(|_| IOError::MemmapContractViolation("failed to read file metadata"))?
+                    .len(),
+            )
+            .unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
             let end = offset
                 .checked_add(expected_bytes)
                 .ok_or(IOError::MemmapContractViolation("mapping range overflowed"))?;
